Condicio Schema — Social Previews

Open standard for contract intelligence data. Position your browser viewport and capture either the clean Light Mode or high-contrast Dark Mode card for your repository Settings.

Condicio
Open standard for
contract intelligence data
parties
clauses
obligations
risks
dates
financials
schema/condicio.schema.json
{
"$schema": "https://condicio.org/schema",
"type": "object",
"required": [
"contract", "parties", "obligations"
],
"properties": {
"contract": { "$ref": "#/defs/contract" },
"parties": {
"type": "array",
"items": { "$ref": "#/defs/party" }
},
"obligations": {
"type": "array",
"items": { "$ref": "#/defs/obligation" }
}
}
}
Condicio
Open standard for
contract intelligence data
parties
clauses
obligations
risks
dates
financials
schema/condicio.schema.json
{
"$schema": "https://condicio.org/schema",
"type": "object",
"required": [
"contract", "parties", "obligations"
],
"properties": {
"contract": { "$ref": "#/defs/contract" },
"parties": {
"type": "array",
"items": { "$ref": "#/defs/party" }
},
"obligations": {
"type": "array",
"items": { "$ref": "#/defs/obligation" }
}
}
}
